details.description: Urban Outfitters is a lifestyle retailer dedicated to inspiring customers through a unique combination of product, creativity and cultural understanding. Founded in 1970 in a small space across the street from the University of Pennsylvania, Urban Outfitters now operates more than 200 stores in the United States, Canada and Europe, offering experiential retail environments and a well-curated mix of women’s, men’s, accessories and home product assortments.
details.name: Urban Outfitters

details.description: Every diamond is hand-selected to match beautifully and must pass exacting quality standards. Kay is diligent about the quality of our craftsmanship. We take the time to ensure the diamonds in your jewelry are well matched to one another. Because we import more diamonds than any other company in the United States, we can offer you the largest and finest diamond selection at the best price. You'll Be Brilliant, Too Our diamontologists are trained experts who are prepared to help you with what could be one of the most important purchases you'll ever make. Using a gemological microscope, you'll see for yourself the 4Cs...the characteristics that make your diamond unique and beautiful. If you're becoming engaged, congratulations! Our Bridal Guide can help you choose your wedding jewelry. If you don't see exactly what you want, ask about our Special Order program.
details.name: Kay Jewelers

details.description: Journeys Kidz is a uniquely branded youth footwear retailer, offering shoes, apparel, backpacks, hats and accessories – all designed specifically for kids ranging from infants to tweens. Journeys Kidz is an extension of the successful Journeys footwear retail concept, combining a fun, energetic in-store atmosphere and welcoming, passionate staff in a family-friendly environment catering to both kids and parents. TVs play carefully curated cartoons and music videos, and are set alongside visual merchandising displays that change monthly to reflect the latest trends and styles for kids. Key brand offerings include Vans, Converse, adidas, Nike, Puma, Timberland, Dr. Martens and UGG.
details.name: Journeys Kidz

details.description: You may have seen "The Inspiration Company" on Good Morning America, The View, in the Grammy's Swag Bag for celebrities or all-over social media! The Inspiration Co. is interrupting the fashion industry with our gorgeous, one-of-a-kind jewelry, gifts and apparel. Founded in 2017 by Doug and Ashley Waldbueser and their amazing team, the little idea that started in a South Florida garage and has now grown to forty-two locations nationwide and shipped over 750,00 bracelets to happy customers in 47 countries worldwide. Our featured products are from the Inspire Me Bracelets brand and are as powerful as they are beautiful. Inspire Me Bracelets are consistently trending on Social Media platforms and are often nicknamed the Tiktok Bracelet and the Insta Bracelet. Our unique jewelry is engraved with sayings that inspire change, encourage faith and ignite the passion in each of us. Come and be inspired at "The Inspiration Co."
details.name: The Inspiration Co.

details.description: Transforming vision care at LensCrafters is what we do best. Discover our full range of premium lenses like Stellest® and the latest technology in AI glasses including Ray-Ban Meta, Oakley Meta and Nuance Audio glasses. Explore our wide range of frames and top designer brands to fit your personal style, with brands including Prada, Versace, Dolce & Gabbana, Burberry, Ray-Ban, Oakley and many more. We accept most vision insurance plans, including Aetna, EyeMed, Humana, United Healthcare Vision and many more. At LensCrafters all prescriptions are welcome! Comprehensive eye exams available. Plan your visit now! https://www.lenscrafters.com/lc-us/eye-exam
details.name: LensCrafters - Mid Level

details.description: Fabletics is an innovative, high-quality line of athletic apparel for women and men that helps you feel and look great for workouts and beyond. Our designs uphold our core principles of fit, function and style.
details.name: Fabletics

details.description: Venchi is an Italian chocolate and Gelato boutique - or ChocoGelateria - celebrating the Italian Art of Living. Venchi brings Italian style and elegance to life through chocolate, gelato, coffee, hot chocolate, and crepes - a pleasure to be enjoyed daily and an experience which involves all of the senses. Venchi creations are crafted with Italian mastery and incorporate 100% natural ingredients for well-being (no palm oil, low sugar, gluten-free, and mostly vegan).
details.name: Venchi

details.description: Since 1975, TUMI has been creating world-class business and travel essentials, designed to upgrade, uncomplicate, and beautify all aspects of life on the move. Blending flawless functionality with a spirit of ingenuity, we’re committed to empowering journeys as a lifelong partner to movers and makers in pursuit of their passions. The brand is sold globally in over 75 countries with upwards of 2,200 points of sale. For more about TUMI, visit www.TUMI.com
details.name: TUMI

details.description: Omega, the prestigious Swiss brand and member of Swatch Group Ltd., the world's leading watch manufacturer, was founded in 1848. For more than 160 years the brand has been synonymous with excellence, innovation and precision, making it the only watch brand to be associated with the conquest of space, and the brand that since 1969 has produced the "Moon Watch" – the one and only watch worn on the Moon. Faithful to its original pioneering spirit, Omega continues to make technical and watchmaking history with innovation in areas as diverse as sports timing, precision technology, and design – innovations that led to the conquest of ocean depths and space. When visitors enter the OMEGA Boutique, they will be warmly greeted by a specially-trained staff that is enthusiastic about sharing their unparalleled knowledge of one of the world’s most respected watch brands. Visit the Omega Watches website at www.omegawatches.com
details.name: Omega

details.description: Mango, one of Europe’s leading fashion groups, is a global company with design and creativity at the center of its business model and a strategy based on constant innovation, the search for sustainability and a complete ecosystem of channels and partners. Founded in Barcelona in 1984, the company closed 2022 with a turnover of 2.688 billion euros, with 36% of business coming from its online channel, and a presence in more than 115 markets. More information at mangofashiongroup.com
details.name: Mango

details.description: Located on level 2 of the Plaza.
details.name: Novesa London

details.description: Welcome to Janie and Jack. We put modern twists on classic fashion for girls, boys, toddlers and babies. Each season we tell stories through our collections, from nautical to equestrian and all the unexpected stuff in between. We create one-of-a-kind dresses girls and baby girls love, as well as standout swimsuits and tops with special details. For boys and baby boys, our crisp button-up shirts are a favorite, along with tailored pants, joggers and shorts. Share family moments in our matching prints and Special Occasion dresses and suits. Looking for the perfect baby shower gift? Our newborn essentials give babies a warm welcome with the softest fabrics. Make the outfit with our must-have shoes, hats and all the right accessories.
details.name: Janie and Jack

details.description: Gregorys was founded in 2006 in Manhattan, New York with a strong focus on quality, innovative products, and world class service. We work tirelessly to select our coffees and develop roast profiles that bring the absolute best out of each bean. We roast four days a week in our facility in Long Island City, always ensuring the freshness and quality of our brews. In addition to our usual blends, we also always carry limited edition single origin coffees that we source for their unique, exotic and special flavor profiles.
details.name: Gregorys Coffee

details.description: MILANJ Diamonds specializes in exquisite fine diamond jewelry with the largest selection of engagement rings in the area. We carry Tacori, Verragio, Albert Tsang, Simon G., Natalie K. as well as our own exquisite designs. Our guarantees and services are unparalleled - we offer independent appraisal services, jewelry repair, and have graduate gemologists on premises. "For all of life's celebrations, make it MILANJ Diamonds."
details.name: Milanj Diamonds

details.description:
We’ve got all the latest styles and timeless classics to help you look good, see better, and feel great. For Eyes has the perfect frames for every member of the family. In addition, an Independent Doctor of Optometry is located near or at our For Eyes store, and is available to provide a complete eye examination, including a dilated exam and peripheral vision testing. For Eyes also takes outside, valid prescriptions and accepts most major health and vision plans.

Services Available: Eye Exams, Contact Lenses Fitting, Eyeglasses and Sunglasses, Maintenance, Frames Selection
details.name: For Eyes

details.description: At Everlane, we want the right choice to be as easy as putting on a great T-shirt. That’s why we partner with the best, ethical factories around the world. Source only the finest materials. And share those stories with you—down to the true cost of every product we make. It’s a new way of doing things. We call it Radical Transparency.
details.name: Everlane

details.description: Under Armour was founded in 1996 by Kevin Plank, a former University of Maryland football player and special teams captain, who changed the way athletes dress forever with the introduction of UA HeatGear, a revolutionary baselayer that redefined performance apparel. Built on innovation and grounded in sport, Under Armour exists to make athletes better. The brand continues to outfit high school and college team athletes across the country with gear built for the field, court, and pitch, and made to perform beyond it. Every product is powered by athlete insight, tested under real conditions, and held to the highest standards of performance. Under Armour’s mission is simple: to empower those who strive for more through relentless innovation, purpose-led design, and a commitment to driving sport forward.
details.name: Under Armour

details.name: Squishables

details.description: Kids Foot Locker offers parents a place where they can get the largest selection of quality athletic footwear, apparel and accessories for their children, as well as, expert advice that will meet or exceed their child's needs.

details.description: Introduced in 2006, Madewell is a modern premium denim brand for men and women. Denim is at the core of everything we do—from the world’s best jeans to all the things you wear with them: tees, boots, leather jackets and more. In addition to great products and artful styling, we also offer meaningful community initiatives that give back to our planet and its people.
details.name: Madewell

details.description: Lush Fresh Handmade Cosmetics makes effective products from fresh, organic* fruit and vegetables, the finest essential oils and safe synthetics. All products are made fresh by hand using little or no preservative or packaging and using only vegetarian ingredients.

details.description: Chic. Luxurious. Elegant. From the perfect little black dress to a gorgeous sparkling bracelet to an amazing wear-to-work collection— Ann Taylor is all about effortlessly chic pieces designed with a modern point of view, designed from the inside out—with quality and craftsmanship, comfort and style always top of mind.
details.name: Ann Taylor

details.description: POP MART is a market-leading character-based entertainment company and a global champion of designer toy culture.

details.description: Cole Haan is turning nearly a century of iconic footwear inside out. The name—synonymous with timeless style and detailed craftsmanship since 1928—has become a beacon of big thinking, channeling their storied heritage into inventive engineering of the future. By integrating purposeful technology into both modern and classic designs, the global lifestyle brand has further dedicated itself to enabling their extraordinary customers to look the part and feel the part, while pushing the limits on what shoes (and beyond) can do. The company calls New York City and Greenland, New Hampshire home, but you can find Cole Haan everywhere. Visit ColeHaan.com and follow @ColeHaan.
details.name: Cole Haan

details.description:
We began as two small Baltimore, Maryland neighborhood boutiques—The White House, opened in 1985, and Black Market, opened in 1995—both founded for and run by women. The vision for each was to be a special, personal style destination for women everywhere.
In 1997, the two stores became one and ?White House Black Market was born. Our vision remained the same as before, as did our commitment to offer unique, individual collections that delivered both style and quality.
White House Black Market has grown since then, and celebrating and supporting women continues to be our mission. In boutiques and online, we are dedicated to providing a modern collection for the way women live now, so they can be their best selves.
Although named for the simplicity of black and white, our curated collections always reflect the latest colors, prints and styles. Our expert stylists are always there to transform a closet, style the current trends and most importantly, are committed to helping each woman create her signature look. It is with pleasure that we offer these personalized services.
details.name: White House Black Market

images.altText: Logo for White House Black Market

details.description: The OFFICINE PANERAI watches are a natural blend of Italian design, Swiss technology and passion for the sea.
details.name: Panerai

details.description:
Since its creation in 1996, Intimissimi has become a highly successful Italian lingerie and intimates brand and the market leader in underwear in Europe.
Intimissimi celebrates the intimate relationship between body and fabric. Just as Italian expertise is integral to the design of each piece, naturally soft fibers are chosen with the utmost care to ensure they feel as good on the skin as they look. The philosophy is simple: natural fibers, supreme comfort, effortless romance.
The winning combination of high-quality products, affordability, and romantic designs has won customer loyalty all over the world. Owned by the Oniverse group, the brand boasts an extensive global franchise network with over 1,700 stores across 54 countries.
details.name: Intimissimi

details.description:
Eileen launched her line in 1984 because she wanted to help make getting dressed easier. Since then, EILEEN FISHER has stayed true to its roots as a design-driven brand offering simple, timeless shapes in high-quality fabrics that are easy to care for. Each piece is thoughtfully designed to mix and match and create endless possibilities. Because the most sustainable clothes you own are the ones that spend the least amount of time in your closet. 
 
As a certified B Corp, the company is committed to taking responsibility for the clothes it makes and where they end up. Bring back your pre-loved EILEEN FISHER pieces to our store and receive $5 per item in Renew Rewards. EILEEN FISHER collects the pieces through its take-back program to be resold, donated or remade into something entirely new—part of the company’s vision for designing a future without waste.
details.name: Eileen Fisher

details.description:
Lids is the world’s largest retailer of officially licensed and branded headwear and fashion-forward apparel. You’ll find products from the hottest brands in the market including New Era, Mitchell & Ness, ’47, Topps Trading Cards, and more. Our stores offer a vast assortment of exclusive, authentic products from all professional leagues - MLB, NBA, NFL, NHL, and NCAA - so you can rep your favorite local and national teams in style. Even if you aren’t a sports fan, you can shop lifestyle brands like Von Dutch, Playboy, and Goorin Bros. - or pick a blank cap and head to our Custom Zone to choose from thousands of text and design options to create your own. 
Fanatics Fan Cash accepted in all stores.
details.name: Lids

details.description:
Founded in Paris in 1994, Solaris is a leading sunglass retailer committed to bringing the ultimate sunglass selection to consumers around the world. From classic and fashion to luxury and sport performance, Solaris delivers the latest fashion trends, current best-sellers and innovations in the sunglasses market. 
Prada, Versace, Dolce & Gabbana, Tom Ford, Gucci, Burberry, Tory Burch, Ray-Ban, Oakley, Maui Jim and other top brands.
details.name: Solaris

details.description: Welcome to the redefined world of bespoke menswear. A world where fashion and innovation are combined - using the finest raw materials, craftsmanship and technology - to transform garments and accessories into pieces as custom as you are unique.

As a lifestyle and design brand, Swatch continues to offer a multitude of unique collections.

details.description: Cinnabon bakeries have built a reputation for serving fresh, aromatic cinnamon rolls made with premium Indonesian cinnamon and topped with a sweet, rich, cream cheese-based frosting. Each Cinnabon product is served hot out of the oven and baked fresh before our guest's eyes. Cinnabon's commitment to premium ingredients and quality has paid off. Cinnabon bakeries have been named the #1 restaurant chain in the USA by an ePinions® online poll. Additionally, Cinnabon was named one of the top 50 pleasures in life by Expansion Magazine, the most influential business magazine in all of Mexico.Starting out as a single product, Cinnabon began to expand its menu with the Minibon®, a smaller version of Cinnabon®'s Classic Cinnamon roll, in late 1987. In 1988, Cinnabon's first proprietary beverage, the Mochalatta Chill® was created and, to this day, remains one of the most craved products on the menu. Following the successful introduction of these products, Cinnabon continued to expand its bakery menu and offerings, including the Pecanbon™ (1997), and, the award winning Cinnabonstix® product (2001).
details.name: Cinnabon

details.description:
From the day that Shirley Collins opened Sur La Table's first store in Pike Place Market in 1972, we’ve provided cooks with exactly what they need to bring their culinary dreams to life -- committing to a simple idea: Make good food. Invite people. Do it daily. For over 50 years, Sur La Table has been a trusted guide and resource for professional chefs and home cooks seeking to feed their passion for cooking. Drawing on the rich heritage of the French culinary tradition and global cuisines, we’re here to inspire a lifetime of delicious meals brought to life with the best products that brands have to offer in the kitchen as well as a rotating seasonal catalogue of hands-on classes for cooks of all levels. Join us in-store to chat with our experts, sample a freshly brewed espresso and discover exactly what you need to achieve your cooking dreams. 
Sur La Table: Make More. Gather Often.
details.name: Sur La Table

details.description: Since its launch in 2002, West Elm has become known for modern, stylish and sustainably produced home design. Each season, their Brooklyn-based team creates their own exclusive furniture, accessories and decor, while also collaborating with iconic and emerging brands and curating discoveries from makers from around the globe.
details.name: West Elm

details.description: RH HAS REIMAGINED ITSELF TO BECOME THE LEADING BRAND IN LUXURY HOME FURNISHINGS, OFFERING THE MOST COMPREHENSIVE AND COMPELLING COLLECTION OF FURNITURE, LIGHTING, TEXTILES AND DÉCOR IN THE WORLD. A MULTIPLATFORM DESIGN COMPANY, THE BRAND’S INNOVATIVE GALLERIES, SOURCE BOOKS AND WEBSITES ARE REDEFINING THE RETAIL EXPERIENCE.
details.name: RH

details.description: Purple is a digitally-native vertical brand with a mission to help people feel and live better through innovative comfort solutions. We design and manufacture a variety of innovative, premium, branded comfort products, including mattresses, pillows, cushions, frames, sheets and more. Our products are the result of over 25 years of innovation and investment in proprietary and patented comfort technologies and the development of our own manufacturing processes. Our proprietary gel technology, Hyper-Elastic Polymer®, underpins many of our comfort products and provides a range of benefits that differentiate our offerings from other competitors’ products. We market and sell our products through our direct-to-consumer online channels, traditional retail partners, third-party online retailers and our owned retail showrooms.
details.name: Purple

details.description: Driven by a passion for exploration and self-expression, Banana Republic designs classic and contemporary pieces for every facet of your life and style. From iconic, wardrobe-defining staples and statement-setting occasion wear to globally inspired home furnishings and décor, every style reflects a commitment to the finest quality materials, mindful sustainability, and timeless design.
details.name: Banana Republic

details.description:
Lovesac sells unique, patented furniture products, including the Company's original foam-filled Sacs, their new modular sectional furniture concept, Sactionals, and other comfortable and stylish home accessories. 
Mission
Making people's lives more comfortable. 
Company Overview
One summer day in 1995 a highly creative, overly impulsive, and un-dieingly determined 18-year-old thought to himself, "I want to take a beanbag and Oversize it." So he did. Since then Lovesac has launched a revolutionary sectional furniture solution called "Sactionals" that are changing the face of modern furniture design. They now have 50+ retail stores throughout the US and a growing rapidly. 
Description
Designer, manufacturer and retailer of patented furniture products including Sacs, Sactionals, and Other Comfy Stuff.
details.name: LoveSac

details.description: 7th Avenue is a modern furniture retailer specializing in functional modular sofas that marry sophisticated design with practical performance. Technical features ensure a stress-free investment built to last 10+ years with water-repellent & stain-resistant OEKO-TEX-certified fabrics, removable & machine-washable covers, endlessly modular design, and durable & sustainably-sourced FSC-certified solid wood frames. Shop indoor and outdoor collections now with a private showroom appointment or a virtual call with a dedicated Design Consultant.
details.name: 7th Avenue

details.description: Our mission is to improve lives by individualizing sleep experiences. From our revolutionary series of SLEEP NUMBER® beds to our exclusive SLEEP NUMBER® Bedding Collection, our vision is to set a new standard in sleep through product innovation and integrated experiences delivered by our associates, the most knowledgeable Sleep Experts in the industry. At Sleep Number, we believe that every body is unique. Unlike ordinary mattresses, the Sleep Number bed offers a revolutionary choice—personalized comfort that can be controlled. At the touch of a button, the Sleep Number bed can be made firmer or softer on each side, making it the perfect adjustable bed for couples. It’s the only bed clinically proven to relieve back pain. With ongoing adjustability, it’s finally a bed that can meet people’s changing needs over time.
details.name: Sleep Number

details.description: Founded in 1818, Brooks Brothers is America’s oldest retailer – synonymous with quality innovation. details.description:
Helzberg is a fine jewelry retailer with a legacy of unconditional care, promises kept, and quality delivered. Everything we do is in service of you. Every yes. Every anniversary. Every “just because.” Helzberg always has been and always will be for you. Our promise is and always has been to deliver unconditional care to our community. With every piece we craft and every story we tell.
Our team of certified industry experts are more than just jewelers. We are here to turn your dreams into reality, with care and craftsmanship at every step. To build trust with our guests, for generations to come. Our dedication to delivering quality goes above industry standards, from sourcing stones to crafting custom designs. Because we know every piece, keepsake, and heirloom purchased means something more to our customers.
Visit us in store or online at helzberg.com.
details.name: Helzberg

details.description: Auntie Anne's provides 11 varieties of hot, fresh pretzel products, in sweet and zesty flavors. It's only natural to want to try one! And nothing goes better with your pretzel than one of our dips and our Old Fashioned Lemonade™. There's nothing to lose because Auntie Anne's has a pretzel perfect guarantee. Auntie Anne's guarantees you'll love your pretzel or they will replace it with one that you do. Yes, that may seem a little gutsy, but when you've rolled, twisted and baked over a billion pretzels (that's 1,000,000,000) there's a pretty good track record. details.description:
Celebrating 25+ years of luxury craftsmanship—from signature bold to quiet confidence—Robert Graham creates #WearableArt for the man who wants to stand out with style. From subtle detail to statement-making design, every piece is made to help you “own the room” in your own way.
Known for expert craftsmanship and exquisite attention to detail, Robert Graham brings together intricately mixed fabrics, unique trims, embroidery, and one-of-a-kind original prints—designed with a full head-to-toe wardrobe in mind.
Discover elevated menswear including button-downs, blazers, graphic tees, premium denim, leather goods, and accessories. Plus, explore our expanding Women’s Collection featuring chic tops, dresses, jackets, and more.
Visit us in store to experience the collection firsthand—or learn more at www.robertgraham.us and @robertgrahamnyc.
details.name: Robert Graham

details.description: AKIRA’s retail legacy began with the dream of creating a high-end boutique experience that marries impeccable service with an incredible, ever-evolving, and always exciting product selection. Today, AKIRA offers a fashion forward, size-inclusive range of apparel, shoes, and accessories. Celebrities and influencers alike love AKIRA’s attention grabbing garments, show-stopping shoe styles, and wide array of well-fitting denim.
details.name: Akira

details.description: Founded in 1937, Windsor is the leading special occasion fashion brand providing glamorous, on-trend styles for all the occasions in a woman’s life. Women come to Windsor to find that perfect look for all of life’s important moments from a formal dress for their first dance to a graduation dress, to that perfect wedding guest dress. Visit Windsor to find the latest trends in women's clothing, from bustiers, to cargo pants, to elevated cocktail dresses and formal dresses for everything from date night to New Year’s Eve outfits.
details.name: Windsor

details.description: Our Road to tomorrow began with a vision and a dream of a man, who transformed ideas into fabrics, weaving a forest, a community and a new style of life. Started in 1910, in Oasi Zegna, the 100 KM2 nature park in northern Italy, Zegna is today driven by the founder’s pioneering commitment to sustainability, responsibility to the environment, the communities and the territory where our sustainability ethos originated.Our road, from sheep to shop, has always been woven with enduring style, with over 110 years of innovation and the world’s finest fabrics and craftsmanship, Zegna remains rooted in building a better tomorrow.
details.name: ZEGNA

details.description: H&M is one of the worlds leading fashion retailers, offering our customers fashion and quality at the best price. We offer a wide range of clothing, with everything from basics to the latest fashion trends. With new items arriving in the stores daily, customers will always be surprised by the fresh selection of merchandise.
details.name: H&M

details.description: Visit Build-A-Bear Workshop® a beary special place where you make your own stuffed animal!  Make your furry friend unique with hundreds of fashions and accessories. We do parties too!

details.description: Uncanny! is the ultimate destination for comics, collectibles, and all things geek. Originally founded in 1985 as Comics and More, we’ve grown into a fan-favorite shop offering a wide selection of comic books, graphic novels, games, toys, apparel, and pop culture merchandise. Whether you're a lifelong fan or just discovering your fandom, our knowledgeable team is here to help you find what you love. Stop by and experience why Uncanny! is a must-visit for geeks of all kinds.
details.name: Uncanny!

details.description:
California Pizza Kitchen (CPK) is your go-to spot for fresh, creative dining with a laid-back California vibe! Every dish and cocktail is handcrafted with the finest, seasonally inspired ingredients — all fueled by a spirit of innovation and adventure. Craving something legendary? Dive into our iconic Original BBQ Chicken Pizza or try one of our bold new menu creations! With a wide variety of vegan, vegetarian, and gluten-free options, there’s something for everyone to fall in love with. From signature, hand-tossed pizzas and high-quality main plates to inventive, better-for-you choices. CPK is ready to take your tastebuds on a delicious journey! We’re open seven days a week, serving up unforgettable lunch and dinner experiences. Plus, we’ve got you covered with corporate and event catering, private group dining, and easy take-out options — including Pick Up, Curbside, and Delivery. Let’s get the party started!
 
Visit CPK.com to learn more.
 
 
Download the CPK Rewards® app for iOS and Android to earn & redeem delicious rewards, order online, and enjoy exclusive pizza perks all year long.
details.name: California Pizza Kitchen

We design sustainable products that are massively scalable—resulting in the greatest environmental benefit possible. Our gallery locations provide you with the opportunity to explore our electric vehicle line up, take a demo drive and learn about our home charging and energy products. For more information, visit www.tesla.com

We are committed to offering our customers signature products and unmatched service – in our more than 185 stores throughout the United States, Canada and United Kingdom.

details.description: Diesel has long been a leading pioneer in denim and casual fashion, known for moving outside and ahead of trends in its industry. While retaining always its DNA, in recent years Diesel has evolved into the world of premium casual wear, becoming a true alternative to the established luxury market.

details.description:
With a mission, culture and conviction dedicated to purpose beyond reason, Oakley unites a common purpose of embracing new product innovations by rejecting the constraints of conventional ideas and ultimately redefining the limits of possibility. Recognized as a definitive sport and lifestyle brand, Oakley, at its core, is a technology company with a heritage of developing products that solve problems with inventions and wrapping those inventions in art.
It is the essence of Oakley that refuses to adhere to limitation and conventional thinking. For more than three decades Oakley has set design, technology and performance standards that few can challenge. Awarded over 500 worldwide patents worldwide, Oakley is a global icon to consumers in more than 100 countries with its premium sunglasses, prescription eyewear, performance apparel and accessories, footwear, watches and electronics.
details.name: Oakley

details.description: Inspired by a healthy, outdoor lifestyle, bartaco combines fresh, upscale street food with a coastal vibe in a relaxed environment. bartaco is specialty cocktails crafted with fresh-squeezed juices, beer out of a bottle, and hand-held foods delivered on metal trays. Located on the exterior crosswalk between Neiman Marcus and Macy's, below Savor.
details.name: bartaco

details.description: From the moment you step into a Marmi store you will recognize our passion for women’s fine footwear. That’s because we know the shoe business and what women want. In addition to their footwear purchases, the Marmi client will always find just the right accessories including belts, jewelry and fine handbags.  Our extensive selection of styles in sizes 4 to 13 and widths slim to wide, along with the attention to detail and uniqueness of our shoes, allows Marmi to stand apart from the competition. Vaneli, Sesto Meucci and Eric Javits are among the top-tier brands of footwear we offer.
details.name: Marmi

details.description:
Base DescriptionWork doesn't look like it used to. Suits aren't necessarily the uniform today. And Johnston & Murphy knows it. Since 1850, Johnston & Murphy has made the shoes that work in the corner office and play at the corner bar.
Much has changed in these 155 years. Our name has changed. Styles have changed. Locations have changed. But one thing has remained constant: Johnston & Murphy continues to be a pillar of classic workmanship and a beacon of American style with a commitment to quality, craftsmanship and innovation that set the standards for men everywhere.
We realize that men today have to walk the line between modern and classic, cool and comfortable. And that dressing to impress is as important today as it was in 1850. We've spent many years helping professional, affluent men do just that. And we're not finished yet.
details.name: Johnston & Murphy

images.altText: Logo for Bath & Body Works - Court

details.description:
Lids is the world’s largest retailer of officially licensed and branded headwear and fashion-forward apparel. You’ll find products from the hottest brands in the market including New Era, Mitchell & Ness, ’47, Topps Trading Cards, and more. Our stores offer a vast assortment of exclusive, authentic products from all professional leagues - MLB, NBA, NFL, NHL, and NCAA - so you can rep your favorite local and national teams in style. Even if you aren’t a sports fan, you can shop lifestyle brands like Von Dutch, Playboy, and Goorin Bros. - or pick a blank cap and head to our Custom Zone to choose from thousands of text and design options to create your own. 
Fanatics Fan Cash accepted in all stores.
details.name: Lids Locker Room

details.description:
Claire’s is a global brand powerhouse for self-expression creating exclusive curated and fun looks for all ages. Every girl is special and powerful and our goal at Claire’s is to inspire and empower girls to express their own unique style through our wide range of jewelry, hair, cosmetics and fashion accessories.
Claire’s is THE place to get pierced.  We’ve pierced over 100 million ears worldwide.  Our highly trained specialists will ensure that your piercing experience is truly exceptional.
Whether you are getting pierced or picking out the perfect accessories for a special celebration, Claire’s will make it special. 
Claire’s…We make memories.
details.name: Claire's

details.description: Established 1987, Aéropostale is a specialty retailer of casual apparel and accessories, offering high-quality denim and fashion essentials at compelling values for younger generations. Aéropostale embraces positivity, authenticity and acceptance to promote a sense of unity among its loyal customers and communities around the world. Through great clothes and meaningful experiences, Aéropostale aims to inspire confidence for all.
details.name: Aeropostale

details.description: At UNIQLO, we design clothing to make everyone’s life better. Simple, high-quality, everyday clothing with a practical sense of beauty—ingenious in detail, thought through with life’s needs in mind, and always evolving. Come visit us and shop our wide range of clothing and accessories for Men, Women, Kids, and Baby.
details.name: Uniqlo

details.description: It is the LEGO® philosophy that ‘good quality play’ enrichesa child’s life – and lays the foundation for later adult life. All LEGO products are basedon this underlying philosophy of learning and development through play.

details.description: The Apple Store is the best place to try all of Apple’s products and find great accessories. Our Specialists will take the time to answer your questions and set up your new Apple product just the way you want it. You can learn something new in a free workshop. Consult with the Business Team about the perfect solutions for your company. Or visit the Genius Bar to get hands-on technical support. Learn more at  www.apple.com/retail/kingofprussia or download the Apple Store app from the App Store.
details.name: Apple

details.description: At Rivian, we’re committed to showing that a successful business can also be good for the planet. That by exploring more responsibly today, we can preserve the environment for the generations that come after us. Achieving this requires real innovation, collaboration and stewardship. And by offering products and services that inspire people to explore and enjoy our world, we hope to also inspire them to want to protect it.
details.name: Rivian

details.description: The Capital One Café is where banking and caffeinating happen together. You can do everyday banking and get in-person support while enjoying your favorite handcrafted beverage—all in one place. Enjoy our welcoming spaces and free Wi-Fi while you get some work done, or take a break and refuel with world-class coffee and delicious food options. Everyone’s welcome—whether you bank with us or not. If you are a Capital One cardholder, you get 50% off handcrafted beverages when using your card. So come on in today.
details.name: Capital One Cafe

details.description:
Journeys is a teen retail leader with an emphasis on footwear and unique specialty items including apparel, backpacks, hats and accessories. With more than 840 stores in all 50 US states, Puerto Rico and Canada, Journeys offers the most popular brands that cater to the teen lifestyle such as Vans, Converse, adidas, Timberland, Dr. Martens and UGG.
Through strategic artistic partnerships, event sponsorships, exclusive content, creative collaborations with musicians and a focus on giving back to the community through charitable events and volunteer programs, Journeys has become more than just a retailer, but a universal part of teen and youth culture. Journeys is, in every way, an attitude you can wear – and an attitude that cares!
details.name: Journeys

details.description: Auntie Anne's provides 11 varieties of hot, fresh pretzel products, in sweet and zesty flavors. It's only natural to want to try one! And nothing goes better with your pretzel than one of our dips and our Old Fashioned Lemonade™. There's nothing to lose because Auntie Anne's has a pretzel perfect guarantee. Auntie Anne's guarantees you'll love your pretzel or they will replace it with one that you do. Yes, that may seem a little gutsy, but when you've rolled, twisted and baked over a billion pretzels (that's 1,000,000,000) there's a pretty good track record. Check out www.auntieannes.com for additional information on Auntie Anne's.

details.description: Primark is an international fashion retailer with 450+ stores in Europe and the US. Founded in Ireland in 1969, Primark aims to provide affordable choices for everyone, from great quality everyday essentials to stand-out style across women's, men's and kids, as well as beauty, homeware and accessories. With a focus on creating great retail experiences, Primark customers come for the joy of shopping for style, quality, and value, for the entire family. That’s so Primark. Follow @Primark on Instagram and TikTok, or visit primark.com to check stock in your local store before leaving home.

details.description: When handcrafting our beverages we always adhere to the spirit of Kung Fu. Our discipline and patience has allowed us to create a wholly unique brewing process. It's a ritual we follow to ensure authentic taste and consistency. By using tea leaves that are handpicked from the mountains of Taiwan, premium natural ingredients, and an unique handcrafting process, our drinks are unrivaled in quality. We make our bubbles every 2 hours, brew our tea every 3 hours, so we are proud to say each drink is made-to-order freshly on the spot. Our time is dedicated to provide an authentic taste in every cup!
details.name: Kung Fu Tea

details.description: LEVI’S® BRAND The Levi’s® brand epitomizes classic American style and effortless cool. Since their invention by Levi Strauss & Co. in 1873, Levi’s® jeans have become the most recognizable and imitated clothing in the world – capturing the imagination and loyalty of people for generations. Today, the Levi’s® brand portfolio continues to evolve through a relentless pioneering and innovative spirit that is unparalleled in the apparel industry. The range of leading jeanswear and accessories are available in more than 110 countries, allowing individuals around the world to express their personal style.
details.name: Levi's®

details.description: Porsche Studio King of Prussia offers a unique blend of luxury automotive culture with the passion of Philadelphia. This exclusive studio showcases the latest Porsche models in an environment that epitomizes elegance and innovation. Visitors can explore a range of vehicles, personalize their dream Porsche in our state-of-the-art Configuration Room, and discover an exquisite selection of Porsche Design Timepieces and lifestyle accessories.As a hub for both Porsche enthusiasts and the curious, Porsche Studio King of Prussia transcends the traditional showroom. It's a place where art meets engineering, featuring rotating exhibits from Philadelphia-area artists, and a sophisticated café offering premium refreshments from our local partners. For those seeking an immersive Porsche experience and a taste of local culture, Porsche Studio King of Prussia is a destination not to be missed on your next visit to King of Prussia Mall.
details.name: Porsche Studio

details.description: LACOSTE is famous today for its iconic polo shirt, available in a wide colour palette every season, but more broadly offers sportswear apparel for men and women, as well as shoes, eyewear, watches, fragrances, handbags and luggage, belts and home textiles.
details.name: LACOSTE

details.description:
Since 1825, Clarks has redefined shoemaking – evolving from a humble workshop in Street, Somerset, into a globally renowned footwear brand empowering millions to move comfortably.
Whether pioneering cutting-edge comfort technologies, championing social change, or creating silhouettes that define generations, progress has forever been woven into Clarks’ DNA.
details.name: Clarks

details.description: Take your coffee making to the next level with Nespresso USA. Explore the pro-style collection of Nespresso coffee machines and espresso machines in designs that are tailored around your needs. Create your own personal at- home coffee bar with Nespresso machines equipped with a milk frother or single service styles. You'll enjoy the streamlined design of the entire Nespresso collection and our delicious array of coffee capsules. Shop our limited editions or range of coffees in various roasts and flavors. No matter what flavor you opt for, you're sure to love your Nespresso products. Visit our boutique today to learn more!
details.name: Nespresso

details.description: Find your perfect fit in King of Prussia with our selection of men's suits in luxurious Italian wool, silk, linen, cotton, cashmere, and alpaca fabrics. From formal weddings to casual business attire, our range of slim and regular fit suits, jackets and tuxedos are available in a variety of colors and materials. Discover everyday essentials for men including pants, shoes, coats, bags and accessories to craft your perfect look - no matter the season. Book an individual appointment for one-on-one personalized styling advice, a group appointment for wedding parties and corporate events or to design your custom suit with one of our Custom Made specialists. Specializing in wedding suits, custom suits, tailored suits, men's formal suits & men's tuxedos.
details.name: Suitsupply

details.description: Founded in 1922, Allen Edmonds Shoe Corporation is a U.S. based manufacturer of premium men’s footwear and accessories. They have been creating timeless, custom-made men's dress shoes and casual shoes since 1922. The shoes use only premium leathers and are handcrafted via a 212-step process.
details.name: Allen Edmonds

details.description: Since its launch in 1993 with a collection of six essential handbags, Kate Spade New York has always stood for color, wit, optimism, and femininity. Today, it is a global lifestyle brand synonymous with joy, delivering seasonal collections of handbags, ready-to-wear, jewelry, footwear, gifts, home décor and more. Known for its rich heritage and unique brand DNA, Kate Spade New York offers a distinctive point of view, and celebrates communities of women around the globe who live their perfectly imperfect lifestyles. Kate Spade New York is part of the Tapestry house of brands.
details.name: kate spade new york

images.altText: Logo for kate spade new york

details.description: At Grown Brilliance, our mission is to create an ethical, transparent, and value-driven approach to jewelry. Our lab grown diamonds are ethically engineered, conflict-free and of the highest quality that never compromise on style or value. Our years of experience and knowledge in the jewelry industry have helped us identify the unique opportunity and incredible need for an alternative to traditionally mined diamonds. Lab grown diamonds are physically, optically, and chemically identical to mined diamonds but are grown in a controlled laboratory setting using advanced technological processes. We crafted a brand that delivers at every level of our commitment to quality, ethics, product integrity, design and value. We are a luxury service that brings you made-to-order and design your own jewelry so that you can find exactly what it is you are looking for. From classic engagement rings to timeless style pieces, we have the perfect diamond jewelry to suit you for any occasion.
details.name: Grown Brilliance

details.description: Basketball Shoes, Casual Shoes, Sneakers, Running Shoes - New Releases & Exclusive Styles from Jordan, Nike, adidas, Under Armour & more.

The collections also feature casual and athleisure pieces, presenting a complete wardrobe for fast-paced modern lifestyles. Tailoring and sportswear are brought together in a look that is ready for whatever the day may hold.
details.name: BOSS

details.description: Therabody is the tech wellness brand that encompasses the line of industry-leading percussive massage guns known as Theragun, as well as products like the RecoveryAir and Wave Roller.

details.description: EVEREVE is a contemporary women's boutique featuring elevated, everyday fashion...with a little edge. Discover thoughtfully selected pieces curated for real life from top brands such as Pistola, Z Supply, Mother, Rails, and our own best-selling line, plus expert styling advice and warm, welcoming service.
details.name: Evereve

details.description:
As the very first private sector fashion garment manufacturer family in Turkey for 93 years, SAYKI is a pret-a-porter garment trademark distinguished in uniting quality and original style. With its detail-oriented process, brilliant patterns, attentive sewing techniques the family’s deep-rooted history gather with modern fashion needs under the roof of SAYKI. Its modern designs address both young and middle age stylish men, SAYKI is a pioneer of charismatic attire with its suits, shirts, ties, coats, accessories and groom suits.
Having over 80 stores in Turkey, the family continues to be a leading innovator with the utmost care in selecting fabrics and developing modern designs for men who feel special, in a wide range of markets.
details.name: Sayki

details.description: JD Sports is a leading retailer of fashionable sportswear and sneakers, combining globally recognized brands such as Nike, adidas, Jordan, Champion, Vans and The North Face with strong own brand labels such as Pink Soda Sport and Supply & Demand.
details.name: JD Sports

details.description: LOFT is your go-to destination for everyday glamour. And the best part is, we help you put your favorite pieces together in a way that makes them your own. That’s why we’re your trusted personal stylist. Shop LOFT stores or LOFT.com.
details.name: LOFT

details.description: Update your home at the Modani Furniture King of Prussia showroom located within the King of Prussia Mall. Expertly situated within the third largest shopping center in America, this store houses Modani favorites along with new trends. Shop in-store to utilize knowledgeable design associates and take advantage of sketchup technology that lets you virtually place Modani products in your own space before you buy. Shop online to discover the entire line of ready and available products. Whether you’re searching for modern, mid-century, contemporary, or outdoor pieces, there is something to suit every space and every taste at the Modani Furniture King of Prussia showroom. Please call or text at 610.616.0066 to learn more about the store, or email contactkop@modani.com.

details.name: Aritzia

details.description: Express is the must-have sexy, sophisticated fashion brand for work, the weekend, or going out. It’s what’s new and what’s now for young fashion-forward women and men. We started more than thirty years ago as an experiment – an offshoot of another successful retail concept. There was nothing but opportunity in front of us and we took it. We aren’t inventors – there are so few of those in the world of fashion today – nor are we imitators, that is far too easy. At Express, we are innovators. We find inspiration and trends from all over the world and interpret them in a way that is uniquely Express. And we have become the preferred destination for the latest trends. Express is a specialty apparel and accessories retailer of women's and men's merchandise, targeting the 20 to 30 year old customer. The Company has over 30 years of experience offering a distinct combination of fashion and quality for multiple lifestyle occasions at an attractive value addressing fashion needs across work, casual, jeanswear, and going-out occasions. The Company currently operates more than 600 retail stores, located primarily in high-traffic shopping malls, lifestyle centers, and street locations across the United States, Canada and Puerto Rico; and also distributes its products through the Company's e-commerce website, www.express.com.
details.name: Express

details.description: TAG Heuer embodies the Swiss avant-garde since 1860. Nestled in La Chaux-de-Fonds, in the Swiss Jura Mountains, the Maison has never ceased to redefine watchmaking. Since its game-changing oscillating pinion introduced in 1887, TAG Heuer continues to craft unique, ground-breaking inventions, where cutting-edge technology combines highperformance and accuracy. One-of-a-kind technological innovations such as the world’s first luxury Connected Watch, demonstrate the Maison’s world-renowned expertise. TAG Heuer boasts high-skilled savoir-faire. Synonymous with high-performance luxury, TAG Heuer challenges existing limits, daring to defy conventions through a unique vision of watchmaking. Since the launch of the Mikrograph, a mechanical chronograph accurate to 1/100th of a second, TAG Heuer has proudly pioneered timekeeping in the high-octane world of motorsports. From the TAG Heuer Autavia, the Maisons’s original racing chronograph, to the iconic square TAG Heuer Monaco, TAG Heuer chronographs are engineered for high-level sports achievements. A passion for action embodied by Ambassador and Formula 1 legend Ayrton Senna, and bold figures throughout each one of the universes of TAG Heuer. They are athletes, drivers, players, stars, and legends. The ones that dare to take up a challenge, determined to achieve their goals through sheer mental strength and who Don’t Crack Under Pressure.
details.name: TAG Heuer

details.description: Since 1884, Breitling has established a global reputation for high-precision timepieces, its pioneering role in the development of the wrist chronograph, and its uncompromising commitment to design excellence. With the brand’s storied association with aviation, Breitling has shared the finest moments in humankind’s conquest of the skies. Renowned for its spirit of innovation, it has also earned a place of privilege in the worlds of science, sport, and technology. Breitling manufactures its own movements in-house and the quality of every watch is confirmed by its status as a COSC-certified chronometer, made in Switzerland.
details.name: Breitling

details.description: Over its 150 year history, IWC Schaffhausen has developed a reputation for creating functional complications, especially chronographs and calendars, which are ingenious, robust, and easy for customers to use. A pioneer in the use of titanium and ceramics, IWC today specializes in highly engineered technical watch cases manufactured from advanced materials, such as titaniumaluminide and Ceratanium®. Preferring the principle of “form follows function” over decoration, the Swiss watch manufacturer’s timeless creations embody their owners’ dreams and ambitions as they journey through life.
details.name: IWC Schaffhausen

details.description: Tourneau | Bucherer is the largest authorized watch retailer in the United States, offering world-famous watch brands like Rolex, Carl F. Bucherer, and Tudor. The brand’s dedication to high-quality craftsmanship inspires unique collections like Bucherer Exclusives and the Masterworks Collection, in addition to rigorous Certified Pre-Owned watch programs including the exclusive Rolex Certified Pre-Owned program. As an international pillar of luxury watch and fine jewelry retailers, Tourneau | Bucherer carries exquisite jewelry collections from the brand Bucherer Fine Jewellery. With over 100 years of expertise, you can trust Tourneau | Bucherer’s expert repairs and unparalleled customer service. For more information, please visit Tourneau.com.
details.name: Bucherer 1888

details.description: Rolex watches are crafted from the finest raw materials and assembled with scrupulous attention to detail. Every component is designed, developed and produced to the most exacting standards.
details.name: Rolex

details.description: At North, we’re passionate about more than just our crave-worthy food. We put our all into every detail so that you know you’re always in good hands. So sit back, and savor every bite, sip, and moment.
details.name: NoRTH Italia

details.description: Foot Locker is the world's leading retailer of athletic footwear and apparel. Headquartered in New York City, it operates approximately 3,900 athletic retail stores in 17 countries in North America, Europe and Australia.
details.name: Foot Locker

details.description: Experience the sights, sounds and most importantly the smells within our robust dining area. Join us as we banish the bland and help you spice up your next meal across a wide variety of restaurants, price points and cuisines types.
details.name: Food Court - Lower Level

images.altText: Logo for Food Court - Lower Level

details.description: GARAGE We’re a casual clothing brand for young women who are fun and effortlessly sexy. With a spotlight on denim, our everyday basics and ‘gram-worthy trends are made to inspire confidence. Created in Montreal, our mission is to empower each other to be confident, authentic and unapologetic in our own style, because at Garage we believe that fashion is fun and a way to celebrate life. #iweargarage
details.name: Garage

details.description: Eataly, the global Italian marketplace and retail concept, will open at the iconic King of Prussia Mall in 2025. Eataly currently has 12 North American destinations and over 50 stores worldwide.
details.name: Eataly

details.description: Built on a passion for competition and a sporting lifestyle, adidas offers premium sport apparel, footwear and accessories to elevate your performance and fit your style.
details.name: adidas

details.description: Abercrombie & Fitch focuses on providing high-quality merchandise that compliments the casual classic American lifestyle. There will also be a section featuring children's clothing and accessories.
details.name: Abercrombie & Fitch

details.description: Introducing Edikted: A Gen Z fashion brand heavily influenced by pop culture, technology and style. Focused on delivering the most-coveted styles, Edikted features clothing and accessories inspired by top streetwear looks, modern-day muses and runway trends. Everyone deserves access to affordable trend-lead fashion — and now, you’ll have yours.
details.name: Edikted

details.description: CADDIS is a mission disguised as eyewear. They're the anti anti-aging brand. That’s their stance. They want to have an open and frank conversation with you about how absolutely right on it is to be the age we are, right here and now.
details.name: Caddis Eye Appliances

details.description: All restrooms at King of Prussia are handicapped accessible.
details.name: Handicapped Accessible Restrooms

details.description: Since 1983, J.Crew has been a destination for timeless American style and quality you can trust. Whether you’re looking for iconic styles or new coastal-inspired classics, work essentials or party outfits, we’re here to help you build your forever wardrobe. And for everything you love about J.Crew, only smaller, check out our crewcuts for kids collection in sizes 2-14.
details.name: J.Crew

details.description: Seasons 52 is a seasonal fresh grill and wine bar. It’s a better way toeat and drink with everything on the menu under 595 calories. The menu changes with the season to feature ingredients at their peak, from whole produce that arrives and is kept 100% fresh, never frozen, to carefully sourced meats and pristine seafood. Entrées are oak-fire grilled or brick oven-roasted, without a fryer in sight, to be flavorful and naturally lighter, and the Wine Bar pours 52 world-class wines by glass and signature cocktails. Lunch and dinner daily, happy hour Monday - Thursday.
details.name: Seasons 52

details.description: People Always first and foremost. An involved associate taking the time to educate a customer about the nuances of a hand blown goblet. A dedicated buyer working with a master weaver to rebuild not only a village's looms, but ultimately an entire community. The personal pleasure of lifelong friendships with many of our vendors and their families. And talk about seeing a friendly face in the morning, there is our amazing family of associates. Many who have been with us fifteen, twenty five, thirty five years. It's these day-to-day relationships that energize our mission. ProductPassion is the word that best captures our fascination and obsession with innovative, high-quality design. While many of our customers are more than familiar with the Crate and Barrel look, what most of them don't know is that the majority of our designs are created exclusively for us. If you could only see our buyers' passports. They travel the world developing new product ideas with skilled craftsmen and artists. And talk about picky. You should see how many prototypes we reject until every curve of a chair, every stem on a goblet, every weave is just how we want it. Our passion for product is what started Crate and Barrel. And it will always be what moves us forward. Presentation First impressions are lasting. At Crate and Barrel, we present our products to help your eye focus on shape, form, color, and function. Our Housewares and Furniture Collection are creatively arranged in a crisp, clean, architectural setting designed to make you feel at home so you can visualize how it will all feel in your home. We pace your experience in our stores with a surprise at every turn. An unexpected take on things that will catch your eye, a spontaneous setting that will invite you to touch, a thoughtful pairing of objects that will make you think... what if?
details.name: Crate & Barrel

details.description: Beginning with the first Maggiano's opening in 1991, Maggiano's blends the tradition of family, the celebration of friends, and the cuisine of authentic Italy in an atmosphere often said to be reminiscent of pre- World War II Little Italy.
details.name: Maggiano's

details.description: In 2004, Shake Shack was born. This modern day “roadside” burger stand serves up the most delicious burgers, hot dogs, frozen custard, shakes, and more. An instant neighborhood fixture, Shake Shack welcomes people from all over the country and world to enjoy fresh, simple, high-quality versions of the classics in a majestic setting.
details.name: Shake Shack - Perimeter

details.description: True Food Kitchen is the chef-driven, culinary destination rooted in nutritional science. Each of their kitchens have an executive chef at its helm, crafting wholesome, intentionally sourced ingredients into flavorful creations that are both good for you and indulgently delicious. They are on a mission to inspire you to eat better, feel better, and live better. Pull up a seat to join the movement to positively impact the future of wellness.
details.name: True Food Kitchen

details.description: Eddie V’s charismatic vibe draws you in and holds you close, invites you to be seen, or sit back and just savor. The finest seafood and steaks. World-class wine and service. And live jazz in the V lounge.Eddie V’s can be found across the country. While each location is unique in its setting, artwork and décor, they all share an unmistakable elegance. Enjoy a virtual visit now. An in-person visit at your earliest convenience.
details.name: Eddie V's Prime Seafood

images.altText: Logo for Eddie V's Prime Seafood

details.description: King of Prussia offers Stroller Rentals at (3) three convenient locations, the upper-level entrance to The Plaza near Dick's Sporting Goods and Bonefish Grill, upper level of the Plaza across from H&M and the lower-level entrance in the Court near Jos. A Bank and Pottery Barn Kids.
details.name: Strollers
